title: Bridge Essay: Metacognition and Confidence: A Review and Synthesis.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-awareness, self-monitoring, neural correlates of meta-awareness.

**Metacognition and Confidence: A Review and Synthesis.**. Annu Rev Psychol.. PMID: 37722748. DOI: 10.1146/annurev-psych-022423-032425. Determining the psychological, computational, and neural bases of confidence and uncertainty holds promise for understanding foundational aspects of human metacognition. While aneuroscience of confidence has focused on the mechanisms underpinning subpersonal phenomena such as representations of uncertainty in the visual or motor system, metacognition research has been concerned with personal-level beliefs and knowledge about self-performance.
